summary: Frontend testing of CRM new features: Eye button, table columns, customer detail page layout, Kişi Ekle button, contact selection in visits, call status options, and edit buttons for notes/visits/calls. Found and fixed 1 critical bug in VisitModal.

ui_bugs.issue: SelectItem with empty string value causing runtime error - FIXED

issues: Web and Ürünler fields only show when they have values (conditional rendering) - this is correct behavior

passed_tests: Eye (Preview) button visible next to company name in table
Table columns in correct order: Firma Adı, Market, Uygulama, Şehir, İlçe, Web, Rakip, Partner, Ürünler, Potansiyel, Durum, Takip Eden
Preview panel opens when clicking Eye button
Customer detail page has 3-column Hubspot-style layout
Left side shows all customer info: Market, Uygulama, Şehir, İlçe, Rakip, Partner, Potansiyel, Durum, Takip Eden
Kişi Ekle button always visible in right column
Kişi Ekle modal opens with all fields (İsim, Unvan, Telefon, E-posta)
Arama (Call) status options present: Yapıldı, Olumlu, Olumsuz, Aranacak, Ulaşılamadı
Notes tab shows notes with edit (Pencil) and delete (X) buttons
Visits tab shows visits with edit button on hover
Visit Modal shows Görüşülen Kişi (Contact Person) selection field
Visit Modal works correctly after fix
critical_code_review_comments: VisitModal.jsx line 209: Changed SelectItem value from empty string to 'none' to fix React Select component error
seed_data_creation: Created test user session and added test contact 'Test Kişi' to first customer
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features tested and working: Eye button next to company name, correct table columns, left-side customer info, Kişi Ekle button, contact selection in Visit Modal (fixed bug), call status options, and edit buttons for notes/visits. Fixed critical bug in VisitModal.jsx where SelectItem had empty string value.
